title: acetosella andicola
intro: Acetosella andicola, also known as Andean wintergreen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acetosella andicola include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
